description: New York Mets designated SS Zack Short for assignment.
Philadelphia Phillies placed RHP Brad Keller on the 15-day injured list retroactive to July 13, 2026. Right elbow UCL tear.
New York Mets activated 2B Marcus Semien from the 10-day injured list.
Philadelphia Phillies recalled RHP Seth Johnson from Lehigh Valley IronPigs.
New York Mets recalled LHP Zach Thornton from Syracuse Mets.
